---
title: Jardin du Luxembourg
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557450/luco_20211017_at83wo.png
description: Le jardin du Luxembourg, Paris
categories: [urbansketch]
date: 2021/10/17
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557450/luco_20211017_at83wo.png)


::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
